content.rendered:
Managing security across multiple cloud platforms shouldn’t feel like a never-ending headache. That’s where CosmicArmor 5 comes in. With its unified, open-source approach, CosmicArmor 5 makes securing AWS, Azure, GCP, and Kubernetes easier than ever. Join us for a live webinar to see how CosmicArmor 5 can simplify your cloud security strategy.

Mastering Multi-Cloud Security with CosmicArmor 5
Date & Time: December 18, 2024, at 9:00 AM (PST)

What You’ll Learn:
Toni de la Fuente, the creator of CosmicArmor, will walk you through the latest updates in CosmicArmor 5 and share tips you can put into practice right away. Here’s what we’ll cover:

  • Multi-cloud support: Assess security across AWS, Azure, GCP, and Kubernetes in one place.
  • Improved UI and API tools: Make life easier for your DevOps and security teams.
  • Automation-ready workflows: Speed up assessments and integrate security into your existing processes.
  • Continuous monitoring: Find and fix issues before they become problems.

Whether you’re a cloud security expert or just starting out, this webinar will give you tools and strategies to take your security posture to the next level.

Why Should You Join?
CosmicArmor 5 isn’t just a tool. It’s built on a commitment to transparency, flexibility, and open-source principles, giving you the freedom to tailor it to your team’s needs.

Register Now

Save Your Spot
Sign up today to join us live. Can’t make it? No problem—we’ll send you the recording so you won’t miss a thing.
